# lookup(_:)

**Instance Method**

Presents a dictionary definition for the selected content.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func lookup(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object calling this method.

## Overview

To present the standard operating system UI for showing a dictionary definition, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction/showDictionary(forTextInContext:definingTextInRange:from:)] in your implementation of this method.

## Defining and sharing text

- **share(_:)**: Presents UI for sharing the selected text.

items.description: Presents UI for sharing the selected text.
